name: x1
long_description:
x1 is building the next generation AI app studio for iOS.

Instead of generating disposable demos, we provide a structured system that guides builders from idea to a production-ready App Store launch. Our platform replaces chaotic prompt loops with modular, purpose-built studios that handle everything from product design to monetization and growth.

We’re turning AI app creation into a disciplined, end-to-end system.
one_liner: World’s Most Powerful AI App Studio
